title: polygonum multiflorum var. ciliinerve
intro: Polygonum multiflorum var. ciliinerve, also known as He Shou Wu, is a variety of the Chinese knotweed plant that is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to tonify the liver and kidney, nourish the blood, and promote the growth of hair and nails. The health benefits of He Shou Wu include anti-aging, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce the risk of age-related diseases and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, He Shou Wu is often combined with other herbs and used in capsule, tablet, or tea form to support its medicinal properties.
